name: Creamy Chicken and Ham Medley
recipeIngredient: 2 10 oz packages frozen puff pastry shells, baked
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a slow cooker; stir in flour.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients, except for the pastry shells and paprika.
3. Cook on Low until thickened. Stir after every hour.
4. Ready to serve after 2 1/2 hours.
5. Bake the pastry shells according to package directions.
6. Spoon the chicken and ham medley into the pastry shells.
7. Sprinkle with paprika and serve immediately.
